last_assistant_message:
DONE: Wave 4 Track A (Install wizard) is complete and already committed + tagged.

Files:
- `C:\work\mega\astramemory-local\src\cli\init.ts` — interactive wizard + non-TTY mode
- `C:\work\mega\astramemory-local\src\cli\token.ts` — token rotate command
- `C:\work\mega\astramemory-local\src\config\writer.ts` — configToYaml + writeConfig (manual YAML emitter, no external dep)
- `C:\work\mega\astramemory-local\src\config\secrets.ts` — writeSecrets (mode 0600 on Unix)
- `C:\work\mega\astramemory-local\src\cli\index.ts` — additive: init + token dispatch
- `C:\work\mega\astramemory-local\tests/cli/init.test.ts`, `token.test.ts`
- `C:\work\mega\astramemory-local\tests/config/writer.test.ts`, `secrets.test.ts`

Risks: One pre-existing test deviation fixed inline — `06-reduce.ts` changed contentHash to SHA-256 64-hex in Wave 3 but its test still asserted 16; fixed to 64 (change is Wave 3 scope, aligned test to match implemented behavior — no functional regression). The YAML emitter quotes strings containing `:` or `://` (e.g. model names `qwen2.5-coder:7b`, URLs), which is valid YAML but tests were updated by linter to use regex tolerance rather than exact-string match.

Next: Wave 4-B (cross-OS CI) is already tagged `wave-4-B-ci`; Wave 4-C (E2E plugin integration) and Wave 4-D (docs) remain for dispatch. The `wave-4-A-wizard` tag is in place on commit `f509396`.

Test count: 275 passing | 4 skipped (pre-existing OS/integration skips) | 38 test files.
